mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending expectations and trigger negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of instances where the unemployment threshold is breached, or the signal loses predictive power during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand that supports corporate earnings and drives positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in over 55% of observations, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in the index of industrial production reflect immediate supply-side bottlenecks that compress profit margins and cause short-term equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative 5-day returns during supply disruptions, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 45% in the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 240, inflationary pressures force markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, resulting in negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or flat when CPIAUCSL breaches 240, or the threshold effect disappears after controlling for real GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms labor market tightening that boosts wage growth and consumer confidence, generating positive quarterly returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative forward returns in more than half of the sample, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly decline in real GDP level triggers immediate risk-off positioning as investors anticipate earnings downgrades, causing negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Short-term returns do not turn negative following sub-zero GDP prints, or the signal shows no predictive edge during economic slowdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production capacity increases corporate output and revenue potential, creating a persistent positive drift in S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 2-year windows, or forward returns show no positive correlation with industrial production growth.
